message:
test(conformance): add io_internal_ops fixture direct execution test

Adds io_internal_ops_fixture_cases_match_execute_fixture_case test which
verifies all 31 glibc _IO_* internal stdio functions against fixtures.
Handles mode="both" by testing both strict and hardened modes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
